facts.statement: McDonald's Corporation franchises and owns and operates McDonald's restaurants serving a locally relevant menu of food and beverages in communities across more than 100 countries.
At year-end 2025, McDonald's had 45,356 restaurants, and approximately 95% were franchised.
The company says its revenues consist of sales by Company-owned restaurants and fees from franchised restaurants operated by conventional franchisees, developmental licensees and affiliates.

McDonald's says its other revenues include fees paid by franchisees to recover a portion of technology and digital platform costs and revenues from brand licensing arrangements for consumer packaged goods.
Franchise and license agreements generally have 20-year terms and include occupancy and operating rights.
Under a conventional franchise arrangement, McDonald's generally owns or secures a long-term lease on the land and building, while the franchisee pays for equipment, signs, seating and décor.

Conventional franchisees contribute to revenue primarily through rent and royalties based on a percent of sales, with specified minimum rent payments, plus initial fees when a new restaurant or franchise is opened or granted.
McDonald's says its heavily franchised business model is designed to generate stable and predictable revenue and resulting cash flow streams.
The company says directly operating McDonald's restaurants helps it act as a credible franchisor and gives personnel a venue for restaurant-operations training.

McDonald's reporting segments include the United States and International Operated Markets, and International Developmental Licensed Markets & Corporate includes the results of over 75 countries plus Corporate activities.

The company says the optimal ownership structure for an individual restaurant, trading area or market depends on factors including entrepreneurial experience, financial resources, and local legal and regulatory conditions.
McDonald's reported FY2025 revenue of $25.494 billion.
McDonald's reported FY2025 net income of $8.469 billion.
McDonald's reported FY2025 operating cash flow of $9.612 billion.
McDonald's reported FY2025 long-term debt of $38.424 billion and cash and equivalents of $1.085 billion.
McDonald's reported stockholders' equity of negative $6.003 billion for FY2025.
McDonald's common stock trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker MCD and has a $0.01 par value.
The SEC submissions metadata identifies the registrant as McDonald's Corporation with SEC name MCDONALDS CORP and SIC description Retail-Eating Places.
The 2025 Form 10-K was signed by Ian F. Borden as Executive Vice President and Global Chief Financial Officer on February 24, 2026.
The 2025 Form 10-K was signed by Christopher J. Kempczinski as Chairman of the Board of Directors, President, and Chief Executive Officer on February 24, 2026.

The 2026 proxy statement says shareholders will vote on the election of 12 directors, an advisory vote on executive compensation, ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as auditor for 2026, and two shareholder proposals.

The proxy statement says the Board provides oversight through a robust Lead Independent Director role, a majority independent Board, and committees with defined responsibilities over strategy, risk, culture, and talent.
The proxy statement says McDonald's advanced its Accelerating the Arches growth strategy in 2025 and was working toward a goal of 50,000 restaurants by the end of 2027.
The proxy statement says McDonald's delivered systemwide sales of nearly $140 billion in 2025.
The proxy statement says McDonald's ended 2025 with nearly 210 million 90-day active users of its loyalty app across 70 markets.
Management and the external auditor stated that internal control over financial reporting was effective as of December 31, 2025.
Ernst & Young identified measurement of unrecognized tax benefits, which totaled $414 million at December 31, 2025, as the critical audit matter in the 2025 audit report.
The 2026 annual shareholders' meeting was scheduled as a virtual meeting for May 20, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Central Time.
